title: Agent Team Console
objective: Ship a repeatable Codex-first Host integration with durable Mission context, Host-plan Waves, and a long-lived provider-neutral Agent Team.
context:
# Ship the Star Harness Host integration

Give the Host a durable plan without turning Wave into a scheduler. Preserve provider-native sessions and make Team, Member, Mission, and Wave navigation obvious.

## Success
- Mission context and Wave responsibility tables remain readable.
- Chat, PendingInteraction, steer, interrupt, and resume are honest.
- Active member work can carry into the next Wave.
- Final browser evidence matches the approved workbench direction.
desired_outcome: Three ordered Host-plan Waves reach an explicit Mission outcome while the linked team remains independently reusable.
